title: BEM-844 route external verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:46 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem843_verify_external_claude_escalation_result.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='external_claude_protocol_response_found' or ps=='real_claude_response_found_non_external':
    status='next_process_protocol_response'
    next_action='parse Claude response and generate agreed protocol document'
elif ps=='dispatch_and_runtime_exist_but_no_protocol_response':
    status='next_repair_response_writer'
    next_action='runtime works; patch Claude prompt/response writer to produce protocol response'
elif ps=='dispatch_result_exists_but_runtime_missing':
    status='next_repair_runtime_state'
    next_action='parse dispatch result and repair Claude dispatcher runtime state'
elif ps=='no_dispatch_result_for_external_escalation':
    status='next_repair_dispatch_result'
    next_action='repair queue processor/result writer or dispatch target; external Claude not reached'
else:
    status='next_diagnose_unknown_external_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-843 unknown status'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_route_after_external_claude_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_route_after_external_claude_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Route After External Claude Verify | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Previous: '+ps+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem844_route_after_external_claude_verify.json','governance/reports/bem844_route_after_external_claude_verify.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-843 external Claude escalation verification')
"""
